name: New Orleans French Market Beignets
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour dough ingredients into the bakery machine and process on the dough cycle.
3. When the dough cycle ends, remove the dough from the machine.
4. On a floured surface with a floured rolling pin, roll the dough out into a 10" x 12-inch rectangle.
5. Cut the rolled dough into 2" x 2-inch squares.
6. Place the squares on greased trays, cover, and let rise for 30 minutes until doubled in size.
7. Heat oil to 365 degrees Fahrenheit in a wok or large saucepan for deep frying.
8. Fry 3-4 beignets at a time for 10-15 seconds on one side until golden.
9. Carefully turn the beignets and fry the other side until lightly browned.
10. Drain quickly on crumpled brown paper bags or on several layers of newspaper covered with a sheet of paper towel.
11. To coat the beignets, shake a few at a time in a paper bag with powdered sugar or 1/4 cup granulated sugar and 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon.
